docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODAS, ROSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRADES, ALICE $862.50 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $884.50, DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE 90 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO FULLY PAY THIS AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRADES, ALICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,612.50 FILED BY RODAS, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRADES, ALICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-23-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-30-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D FOR 6 MO. INTERVALS UNITL PAID OFF, AT WHICH TIME CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $150/MO,
BEGINNING ON 8/1/04 & ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY
